expected_findings.description: SQL injection in login(): username is interpolated directly into a SELECT query via template literal, allowing authentication bypass
SQL injection in register(): username is interpolated directly into an INSERT query via template literal, allowing arbitrary SQL execution
SQL injection in findUsersByRole(): role parameter is interpolated directly into a SELECT query via template literal
Sensitive data exposure in login(): returns the full User object including password_hash to callers via SELECT *, leaking the password hash to downstream code and potentially to API consumers

Sensitive data exposure in register(): returns the full User object including password_hash to callers via RETURNING *, unnecessarily exposing the password hash to downstream code and potentially to API consumers
